thresholds._note: capability_accuracy/min_capability_recall/topk_recall are placeholders until the operator runs eval/goal-pick/rebaseline.py; freeze them to the recommended C-baseline it reports. abstain_rate=1.0 (OOS must fully abstain) and wrong-domain-substitution=0 are hard invariants (V2 DoD).
